title: dianthus demirkushii
intro: Dianthus demirkushii, also known as Turkish pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus demirkushii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
